provider.name: Gemini Agent Commerce Suite
provider.description: Monetized production tools for autonomous Gemini & LLM AI agent-to-agent commerce.

capabilities.name: market_data_insights
capabilities.description: Fetches real-time institutional quantitative market metrics and sentiment data for Gemini agents.

capabilities.name: agent_task_executor
capabilities.description: Executes remote sub-agent task payloads in an isolated secure sandbox for Gemini tasks.

capabilities.name: agent_escrow_service
capabilities.description: Creates and releases multi-sig conditional escrow contracts for Gemini agent-to-agent trades.

capabilities.name: agent_code_security_auditor
capabilities.description: Performs static analysis and vulnerability scanning on agent code payloads before execution.

capabilities.name: liquidity_arbitrage_predictor
capabilities.description: Scans DEX/CEX order books to identify real-time cross-chain arbitrage spreads.

capabilities.name: agent_context_firewall
capabilities.description: Sanitizes bought data streams and incoming API payloads for hidden prompt injections, jailbreaks, and context-poisoning attacks before agent ingestion.

capabilities.name: agent_execution_proof_attestor
capabilities.description: Generates cryptographic step-telemetry and merkle execution trace commitments proving compute work was actually performed by seller agents.

capabilities.name: agent_sla_micro_insurance
capabilities.description: Locks micro-bonds for seller tool calls. Automatically triggers instant buyer refunds and micro-penalties if seller latency exceeds SLA thresholds.
